name: automattic/underscores
description: Hi. I'm a starter theme called _s, or underscores, if you like. I'm a theme meant for hacking so don't use me as a Parent Theme. Instead try turning me into the next, most awesome, WordPress theme out there. That's what I'm here for.

scripts.make-pot: wp i18n make-pot . languages/sunflower.pot --domain=sunflower --exclude=node_modules,vendor && wp i18n make-pot . languages/sunflower-accordion.pot --slug=sunflower-accordion --domain=sunflower-accordion --exclude=node_modules,vendor && wp i18n make-pot . languages/sunflower-contact-form.pot --slug=sunflower-contact-form --domain=sunflower-contact-form --exclude=node_modules,vendor && wp i18n make-pot . languages/sunflower-latest-posts.pot --slug=sunflower-latest-posts --domain=sunflower-latest-posts --exclude=node_modules,vendor && wp i18n make-pot . languages/sunflower-meta-data.pot --slug=sunflower-meta-data --domain=sunflower-meta-data --exclude=node_modules,vendor && wp i18n make-pot . languages/sunflower-next-events.pot --slug=sunflower-next-events --domain=sunflower-next-events --exclude=node_modules,vendor && wp i18n make-json languages/ --no-purge
